'''Nanda-Ree Janoo''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Janoo was made a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], serving alongside such esteemed Jedi as [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] being, Nanda-Ree Janoo was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], which taught Janoo the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After passing the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Janoo was elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Janoo became a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the ranks of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. At some point during the conflict, Janoo was assigned to work with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in leading a task force to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Balamak/Legends|Balamak]] in order to destroy an experimental communications jamming array. During the [[Battle of Balamak/Legends|battle]] above the world, Janoo piloted a [[Jedi starfighter|starfighter]] against the CIS fleet. After fellow Jedi [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] destroyed the array, the Republic forces returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TCSWE" />
